title: SmartLogin
description: Automatically logs you into servers with /login (AKA auto login)
body:
Isnt it annoying having to type out the /login for ALOT of servers?

Well it is to me, so I wrote this mod to automatically sign me into those servers.

### **HOW TO SETUP:**

1. Download the mod, put it into your mods folder
2. Run the game once, and then close it
3. Go to the config folder found inside of your .minecraft folder (Or wherever your game directory is)
4. You should see the "smartlog.cfg" Open that with notepad or any text editor of your choice
5. On the line that says "**S:password=ChangeMe!**" change the **ChangeMe!** to your password
6. Save it and re-launch minecraft
7. Tada! all done
